name: LegalZoom Business & Legal Services API
what_it_does: LegalZoom REST API for automated legal document generation, business formation, and compliance services. Enables AI agents to manage LLC, corporation, and nonprofit formation filing automation across all US states, handle registered agent service data management for business compliance monitoring, access annual report and compliance filing data for business regulatory deadline tracking, retrieve trademark search and filing status data for intellectual property management, handle business license and permit research and filing workflow, access estate planning document generation including wills, trusts, and powers of attorney, retrieve legal document template and customization workflow data, manage attorney consultation scheduling and matching for legal service routing, handle operating agreement and corporate governance document automation, and integrate business formation and legal compliance data with accounting, ERP, and SMB management platforms.
use_cases: Automating LLC formation from business launch agents
Tracking compliance deadlines from registered agent agents
Filing trademarks from IP management agents
Managing annual reports from business compliance agents
not_for: Complex commercial litigation without self-service consumer legal scope
Enterprise legal counsel requiring full-service law firm capabilities
International business formation without US jurisdiction focus
best_when: A fintech, SMB platform, accounting software, or business services company wants AI agents to automate business formation, registered agent management, annual report filing, trademark searches, and legal document generation for US SMB customers.
avoid_when: LEGAL RISK: LegalZoom provides legal document automation, not legal advice — automated legal decisions based on LegalZoom document templates without attorney review create professional liability and unauthorized practice of law risks for complex legal scenarios. Business formation automation must validate state-specific requirements (naming, organizer, registered agent) for each state. Trademark filing automation without trademark attorney review for clearance creates trademark risk.

auth.notes: LegalZoom uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for partner integrations. Per-partner credentials. Webhooks for order status events. REST API with JSON. Glendale, California HQ. Public (LZ NASDAQ, IPO 2021). Consumer and SMB legal services platform. Partner API for embedded legal services. 4M+ customers. 20+ years operating. Competes with Stripe Atlas (business formation) and Rocket Lawyer for online legal services.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — partner program required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction pricing for formations and filings; revenue share model for partner integrations
pricing.notes: Glendale, California. Founded 2001. Public (LZ NASDAQ, IPO 2021). 4M+ customers. Online legal services platform for consumer and SMB. Services: LLC/Corp formation ($0-$300+), registered agent ($299/year), trademark filing ($199+), estate planning. Partner API for embedded legal services in accounting and business platforms. Competes with Rocket Lawyer, Stripe Atlas, and Incfile for online legal services.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; partner tier dependent

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: Business formation and legal documents require jurisdiction-specific accuracy; automated filing errors (wrong state, naming conflicts) result in rejected filings and customer harm
State processing time variability — state agency processing times vary dramatically (same day to 6+ weeks); automated formation workflows must communicate processing time uncertainty to end customers
Trademark clearance risk — automated trademark filing without attorney clearance search creates likelihood of confusion risk and application rejection
Unauthorized practice of law boundary — LegalZoom is document automation, not legal advice; agent-driven legal recommendations beyond document selection cross UPL boundaries
Annual report deadline variability — annual report due dates and fees vary by state and entity type; automated compliance must apply state-specific due date rules
Name availability pre-check — business name availability changes rapidly; automated formation must check name availability immediately before filing, not at order creation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal document automation. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Business entity and personal legal document data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal services. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Business entity and personal legal data.
